---
name: Improvement / feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, endpoint, widget block, CLI command, or docs section
labels: ["improvement"]
---

### Area

- [ ] SDK
- [ ] Widgets
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Calculator
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Public API (server side)
- [ ] Other

### What is missing or could be better

What you tried to do and could not.

### Suggested change

A rough sketch is fine. Code snippets, API shape, or wireframe welcome but optional.

### Why

What it unlocks for you or other integrators.
